title: Principal Frontend Developer at Birlasoft International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Birlasoft International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Birlasoft International Enterprises in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
